CONTENT.Early life: Poundjé was born in France to Cameroonian parents, and has dual nationality. He acquired French nationality on 14 May 2001, through the collective effect of his father's naturalization.
CONTENT.Club career: On 13 February 2022, Poundjé signed with Lausanne-Sport in Switzerland.
CONTENT.External links: Maxime Poundjé at the French Football Federation (in French)Maxime Poundjé at the French Football Federation (archived) (in French)
CONTENT.International career: Poundjé is a former youth international for France, and has received a callup to the Cameroon national football team which he rejected.

SUMMARY: Maxime Aurélien Poundjé (born 16 August 1992) is a French professional footballer who plays as a defender.
